21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Piotr Witkowski
"All really great things are happening in slow and inconspicuous ways." - Leo Tolstoy So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: It often does
item.description: A coworker of mine was shocked to learn that I serve no gods. Lol she worships an orange faced con artist so I honestly don't care what she thinks. I just laughed in response to her idiotic question (you know the one, "but where do your morals come from?!") and carried on.
item.dc:creator: SybilCrawley

item.title: A father killed the man that sexually abused his child.
item.description: Video footage from 1984 captures Gary Plauché just moments before he shot child predator Jeffrey Doucet. On March 16, 1984, Leon Gary Plauché shot and killed Jeffrey Doucet, who had kidnapped and raped Plauché's son, Joseph Boyce "Jody" Plauché. Plauché shot Doucet as he was being escorted through Baton Rouge Metropolitan Airport by law enforcement to face trial, an event that was captured on camera by a local news crew. Plauché was given a seven-year suspended sentence with five years' probation and 300 more hours of community service, receiving no prison time. When he was questioned as to why he shot Doucet, Plauché contended that he was in the right for killing Doucet for sexually assaulting his son and that any parent in a similar position would have done the same thing, stating "if somebody did it to your kid, you'd do it too." https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Killing_of_Jeffrey_Doucet All pedos deserve this when their guilt is certain.
item.dc:creator: lurkyloos

item.title: Just Funny X Things, Vol CV
item.dc:creator: TwitterLitter

item.title: But why?
item.description: Why does Imgur allow its blocked users to view and search the blocker's profile and posts? People block others for a plethora of reasons, some examples being: harassment, disliked content, contrarians etc. I, myself, being someone who normally doesn't "fire from the hip" when commenting on most topics (especially those that are nuanced and complex), usually expend an inordinate amount of time and effort to formulate my response, *try* to check myself for bias, and confirm that my position has some shred of evidence. I DON'T WANT TO SPEND 20 MINS DOING ALL THIS FOR A COMMENT I CAN'T POST!!! If the explanation is something like, "research shows this is best intervention for deescalation", then fine, otherwise I find it to be nothing more than a ploy to keep traffic metrics up for ad revenue. Yes, I checked my app was updated, signed out/in, cleared my cache, and reinstalled to verify it wasn't a tech issue on my end. ≈≈≈ TL;DR: OP had a minor crashout bc they spent 20mins on comment not realizing they were blocked and said comment wouldn't be posted.
item.dc:creator: spittleteets

item.title: Only costs $30 to fill up!
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Please look please look please look I did the art for this game!!!
item.description: Oh hi good morning, Shia here, Overshia on bluesky, I am really freaking happy today. Ages ago I sent some of my Fallout fan books to Bethesda because my friend and I are huge Fallout fans. The lead designer saw it and contacted me when he quit the company and went to make his own indy game and commissioned me to draw a SHITTON OF ART. Today it seems there's going to be a collectors edition of it! THAT'S ALL MY PAINTINGS! AAAAAH
item.dc:creator: Drunkfu

item.title: A Life of Fear
item.description: Fake Patriots hate real Americans like the Women, Black, Hispanic/ Latino /Native, LGBTQIA, and every other minority group they have attacked. I helped stop dudes like him from trafficking people and things... This disabled combat veteran however, has the backs of all who value human rights. And those who are oppressed. It's why I personally had worn the uniform. Human Rights are Non-negotiable. Follow the link to help the wife and I https://linktr.ee/GridSquares
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: I'm a little choked up.
item.description: My kid just turned 18. Her mother and I divorced 6 years ago and have 50/50 custody. She invited me out for coffee today and told me that her first official adult decision was to hang out with me during her week at her mom's house.

item.title: This touch my heart

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Friday Random MEME DUMP to help you finish work #842
item.description:
1. DAD GOT THE BEST MOVES YOO
2. JUST EXCELLENT WINE
3. European homies will instantly understand why he went for a header instead of trying to catch it with hands
4
5. LEGIT ANGRY BIRD (Sound on for the scream you didn't expect)
6. This is how big wind turbines actually are (human for scale)
7. hah that NPC ragdoll fall
8. BRING IT BAAACK NOWWW!
9. Introverts pretending to go out and have fun with other people
10. I feel there is an easier way of doing this
11
12. Yeah, what the heck is wrong with these people!
13. BAMBOOZELEED
14
15. It's never to late to be creative. What are you passionate about? Please share in the comments! For me it's game dev and I'm currently working on silly psychological horror game with my brother! I basically learned Unreal Engine from scratch just so I can make games like we played when we were kids. If you like to help us please wishlist the game on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment P.S. 1 Have a great weekend! Don't forget to hydrate and be mindful of negative thoughts! P.S. 2 We are also making a stand against AI in art and coding, so we won't be using any of this slop during development of the game!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Thankfully We Don't Have That Sort of Problem Here...
item.description:
Sauce: https://creators.yahoo.com/lifestyle/story/instagram-bot-purge-2026-millions-of-followers-vanish-as-celebs-and-creators-are-hit-hard-230919317.html
Not a fan of Meta or Zuck's megalomania but *maybe* more Execs might realise that quality is better than quantity...I won't hold my breath. To give a sense of the size and scope, Kylie Jenner lost 15million followers in only a few hours. lol
item.dc:creator: spittleteets

item.title: Much ferocious
item.description:
I’ve been deep into watching the tv show Running Point, but Alis and Jorge’s fighting dragged me out of it. You bite that butt, Alis!
My legs may be a little scratched up due to them, but it’s worth it for the cuteness
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
